description: Product Description Convenient and Stylish Shopping Trolley Token Key Rings (Pack of 12) Material: Zinc Alloy Dimensions (Token): 22 mm (0.86 inches) in diameter Key Ring Diameter: 3.5 cm (1.38 inches) Quantity: Pack of 12 Designs: Assorted (refer to product images) Colour The Ultimate Solution for Hassle-Free Shopping and Locker Access! Introducing our convenient Key Ring Token Pack, the ultimate solution for hassle-free shopping and gym experiences! Each pack contains 12 key rings, each featuring a token that serves as a perfect substitute for the £1 coin traditionally required for releasing shopping trolleys at supermarkets. Simplify Shopping and Unlock Any Locker! Additionally, these tokens can be used for gym lockers, ensuring you never have to fumble for loose change again. Say goodbye to the inconvenience of carrying coins and embrace the simplicity of our Key Ring Token Pack! Colour may vary due to lighting and individual monitor settings, but rest assured, our Key Ring Token Pack offers the same high-quality and functionality! Multi-Functional Trolley Token Key Rings Pack of twelve key rings with new shape £1 coin trolley tokens for everyday use. Works with all supermarket trolleys, including Aldi, Lidl, Tesco, and Sainsbury. Ideal for shopping trolleys, gym lockers, and other coin-operated equipment. Features the latest version of the new shape 12-sided token for wide compatibility. Includes around 20 unique designs to suit different styles and preferences. Perfect Gift for loved ones This pack makes an ideal gift for friends, family, or colleagues who love convenience and practicality. Whether it's for a birthday, holiday, or special occasion, this thoughtful present will be appreciated by anyone who wants to simplify their shopping trips and locker access. With its versatile usage and stylish design, it's a gift that combines functionality with everyday convenience. Show your loved ones that you care about their convenience and make their lives easier with this multi-purpose Key Ring Token Pack. Tokens for Lasting Convenience! Crafted with durable materials, our key rings are built to last. The tokens are made from high-quality zinc alloy, ensuring they can withstand regular use without losing their shape or functionality. Stylish Design Options Express your individuality with our range of attractive designs. From classic patterns to trendy motifs, there's something for everyone. Whether you prefer a sleek and minimalistic look or a burst of vibrant colours, our key rings offer options to suit your personal style. A Must-Have Accessory! Our Key Ring Token Pack is designed to provide you with unparalleled convenience in your daily life. Say goodbye to the hassle of searching for coins or worrying about carrying them with you. With our tokens securely attached to your keychain, you'll always have quick and easy access to shopping trolleys, gym lockers, and more. No more fumbling through pockets or purses to find the right coin – our Key Ring Token Pack ensures smooth and effortless unlocking every time. Streamline your daily routine and enjoy a seamless experience whether you're running errands, hitting the gym, or embarking on a shopping spree. It's the ultimate solution for lasting convenience, making your life simpler one token at a time. Invest in our Key Ring Token Pack and unlock a world of ease and efficiency!
